sp_widget.name: IncentNow Table Widget
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"hint":"table backend name","name":"table","section":"other","default_value":"","label":"Table","type":"string"},{"name":"page_size","section":"other","default_value":"10","label":"Page Size","type":"string"},{"hint":"view","name":"view","section":"other","default_value":"Default view","label":"View","type":"string"},{"hint":"Title","name":"title","section":"other","default_value":"","label":"Title","type":"string"},{"hint":"'true' if u want to show the view period column","name":"viewperiod","section":"other","default_value":"","label":"View Period","type":"boolean"},{"hint":"filter","name":"filter","section":"other","label":"Filter","type":"string"}]
sp_widget.template:
{{::options.title || data.table_title}}

{{field.column_label}} Actions
{{rec[field.column_name].length > 20 ? (rec[field.column_name] | limitTo:20) + '...' : rec[field.column_name]}}
Page {{c.data.page}}/{{c.data.total_pages}}
No Records Found
{{data.debug_message}}
